arts.ttl: Serie A Weekend Predictions: Milan Derby, Roma-Napoli & More Key Clashes
arts.sum: A weekend of high-profile matches in Serie A, headlined by the iconic Derby della Madonnina, is upon us. After experiencing contrasting fortunes in the Champions League, arch-rivals Milan and Inter will renew hostilities at the San Siro on Sunday. The post Serie A Weekend Predictions: Milan Derby, Roma-Napoli & More Key Clashes appeared first on The Cult of Calcio.

arts.ttl: Official: Torino Sign Former Napoli Midfielder on Loan
arts.sum: Bundesliga powerhouse RB Leipzig confirmed Elif Elmas' switch to Serie A underachievers Torino on loan with an option to buy. Indeed, the German club issued a statement on Friday to announce the agreement. The post Official: Torino Sign Former Napoli Midfielder on Loan appeared first on The Cult of Calcio.

arts.ttl: Inter Only Willing to Sign Roma Outcast on One Condition
arts.sum: Roma ace Nicola Zalewski must put pen to paper on a new contract at the Stadio Olimpico before joining Serie A champions Inter. According to Tuttosport via FCInterNews, that's the only way for the 23-year-old to complete his loan move to Giuseppe Meazza. The post Inter Only Willing to Sign Roma Outcast on One Condition appeared first on The Cult of Calcio.

arts.ttl: Manchester United transfer update: Alejandro Garnacho 'enquiry' from new Premier League rival amidst Chelsea, Napoli interest
arts.sum: Manchester United reportedly receive a fresh enquiry from a Premier League rival amidst interest from both Napoli and Chelsea, with the Red Devils under pressure to sell.

arts.ttl: Napoli’s Race Against Time for Saint-Maximin Deal
arts.sum: Napoli have reached a verbal agreement with Al Ahli for the loan of Allan Saint-Maximin, but the Italian club face a tight deadline to complete the transfer. The potential move comes as Napoli seeks to fill the void left by Kvicha Kvaratskhelia's departure. The post Napoli’s Race Against Time for Saint-Maximin Deal appeared first on FootItalia.com.

arts.ttl: Roma In Talks With Las Palmas for Marmol
arts.sum: Gianluca Di Marzio reports that Roma have taken a significant step in their pursuit of Las Palmas defender Mika Marmol, initiating direct contact with the Spanish club. The Giallorossi are keen to bolster their defensive options, and the 23-year-old centre-back has emerged as a prime target in the final hours of the January transfer window. The post Roma In Talks With Las Palmas for Marmol appeared first on FootItalia.com.

arts.ttl: Fulham Linked with Roma’s Matias Soulé
arts.sum: Fulham have set their sights on Roma's young Argentine striker, Matias Soulé. The 21-year-old, who joined Roma from Juventus last summer, has found playing time limited in the Italian capital this season. The post Fulham Linked with Roma’s Matias Soulé appeared first on FootItalia.com.
